headline: Mohawk Industries: An Upgrade Makes Sense Even As Market Conditions Are Weakening
summary: Mohawk Industries saw Q1 2026 growth, cost cuts, strong cash flow and cheap valuation vs. peers. See why MHK stock is upgraded to a buy.
